SIX FIGURE EMAIL # 5 

The “DMV Downsell”



Ry Schwartz & Copyhackers 

2020



SIX FIGURE EMAIL # 5

About This Template:

Why we use it

Biggest Mistakes in a Downsell

What we’re “selling”:

Where to Use it:

How to Use It:

Exploratory Questions

4 Types of Downsells:

Template

See it in action:

Example 1: Downsell: Splintered part of program

Example 2 (Same product with less hand holding)



About This Template: 

One of the SINGLE most profitable emails you can send in a launch or campaign is actually immediately after the initial campaign has CLOSED.



This is where non-buyers are most agitated and therefore the most ripe for being coached into a conversion. 



A well designed downsell can pad your campaign with thousands or even tens of thousands of extra dollars in revenue, while building more goodwill and trust than if you left your non-buyers hanging. 



Why we use it



One of the BEST times to make a sale is RIGHT after the initial campaign window has closed.



Not only does this provide you with a second chance to make a sale, but it’s a second chance for your audience to move closer to a desired, more appropriate outcome. 



In short, it’s a valuable opportunity to create a win-win and therefore a tighter bond with your audience. 



From a customer perspective, this is also the most vulnerable moment. 



Following a campaign where we’ve unearthed pain, elicited commitment to a desired outcome, and ramped up “fear of missing out”, our non-buyers are left in a state of: 



Feeling of Missing out (even stronger than typical fear of missing out) 

A feeling of being unserved, unloved, or unbelonging. 

Relational imbalance (they didn’t get to reciprocate the value you provided) 

Regret around not being about to pull the trigger

Shame around not yet being in a position to benefit from the offer. 



If we don’t immediately step in by acknowledging their decision and giving them a chance to belong in a more appropriate way, we risk them justifying their non-buying experience with false negative beliefs about us, our company, or even themselves… thus disqualifying them from future purchases. 



Biggest Mistakes in a Downsell 



Guilting or shaming them into a sale. 

Making them feel like they’re getting a second rate product. 

Painting the FOMO on too thick

Making it feel like a “compromise” instead of a new, more fitting opportunity. 

Not being transparent. Unless you give your real motivation, your audience may think it’s just a cash grab. 



What we’re “selling”:



Release from FOMO (feeling of missing out) 



Confirmation of why they didn’t buy (make it a decision). 



Reinforcement of their previous decision. Which builds… 



Self trust and trust in you + Consistency. And leads to… 



Re-empowered to choose a more appropriate fit. 



A shift in perception: From a non-buyer to a smart buyer. 



Where to Use it:

I like to introduce a downsell 24 hours after the initial promotion closes. Any longer than that and you risk the “feeling of missing out” being numbed or overwritten. 



How to Use It: 

Exploratory Questions



Without looking at price, in what ways was your audience NOT ready or empowered to benefit from your initial offer? 



In what ways was their decision not to buy a SMART one? 



Looking at the downsell options, what MIGHT they be in a better position to receive value from? 



What unique and positive characteristics exclusively empower them to make the most of the new offer? (ie. autonomy, self-motivated, cautious, etc.) 



4 Types of Downsells:



Stripped down product without the hand holding (no calls, support, live elements etc.) 

A shorter subscription length (ie. for SaaS) 

A more introductory product within your suite that empowers them for the full product later. 

A splintered part of the main product designed to give a crunchy, valuable, more immediate result. 



Template



[Remind them of offer they missed] 

[Show you care - that they’re still on your mind] 

[Confirm that they made the right decision] 

[Commend them on that decision - and WHY it was the right one] 

[Transition: What about their current stage or unique abilities makes them exclusively empowered for your downsell offer] 

[Introduce the downsell offer]

[CTA]

[OPTIONAL: Give unselfish reason for the downsell] 

[Urgency/Scarcity/Guarantee] 

[CTA2] 



See it in action: 

Example 1: Downsell: Splintered part of program

Subjects:

The #1 reason why EVERYONE should start a tech company

[90% OFF] Get the most TRANSFORMATIVE module from Idea to Exit 

[LIVE] Idea to Exit: Module 1  



Body: 



Entrepreneurship is the ultimate form of personal development..



It acts like a forcing function to improve your thinking.



To challenge your current circumstances. 



To set big, ambitious goals…



… and to EVOLVE into the type of person who can achieve them. 



We hear so much about how entrepreneurship transforms lives.



In some cases, even SAVES them.



But without the proper tools or frameworks, it’s hard to accept this statement as anything more than fluffy quote-card material.



Well all that changes today, <first name>. 



As you know, I recently closed the doors to my flagship course, Idea to Exit.



It would’ve been great to serve you there. 



Yet after welcoming our new crop of students, I’ve quickly come to realize that this is more of an advanced program for startup founders who are already “all in” on their tech company.



Therefore, it may have been “too much too soon” for someone still making that transition.



In short - thanks for seeing what I couldn’t…



And for saving yourself from unnecessary overwhelm :) 



And while I’ll admit that I AM pumped to be bringing a new group of super driven entrepreneurs along for that ride, I haven’t forgotten about YOUR journey, <first name>.



Not at the slightest.



In fact, I spent most of the weekend wrapping my head around the ways I can continue to spur your growth and bring you closer to starting your company in a powerful (and sane) way. 



A way that rewards your unwavering intent to start an exciting and disruptive tech company…



… without disrupting your current day-to-day life in any kind of crazy, unsustainable way. 



And then it hit me.



I  just released the first Module of of Idea to Exit.



It’s called The Founder’s Foundation, and it’s been a massive hit inside the ITE community.



In 4 high impact lessons, the Founder’s Foundation rips through the broken paradigms and self-limiting scripts that sabotage most entrepreneurial careers…



… and swiftly replaces them with the mindset shifts, growth frameworks and success habits that build character and accelerate your climb up the entrepreneurial ladder.



In short, preparing you to BECOME the type of business leader that can start, scale and ultimately sell your company.



All while keeping your health, relationships and personal/spiritual goals in check. 



No surprise that It’s hitting a major chord within the Idea to Exit community.



So much so that I’ve had a few members tell me that this module ALONE is worth the $2,000 price tag of the course.



But today, I want to give YOU a chance to get access to Module 1 at a ridiculously small fraction of the full Idea to Exit enrolment fee.



There are two main reasons I’m doing this:



To thank you for sticking with me throughout the Idea to Exit launch period (I know… I was quite the fixture in your inbox ;) 



Selfishly speaking, I KNOW (and many have confirmed) that what you’ll learn in this module will set you up to rise up to a whole new level as an entrepreneur. And from that place, I know you’ll be in an even better position to take advantage of (and profit from) the full Idea to Exit course when it eventually re-launches. 



So here’s what I’m prepared to do for you, <first name>. 



As a special, one-time offer, you can get access to MODULE 1 of Idea to Exit for just a single investment of $197.



>>> MODULE 1: THE FOUNDER’S FOUNDATION (SPECIAL OFFER) 



Here’s what you’ll find inside:



Lesson 1: The Evolution of an Entrepreneur Framework

Lesson 2: How to Create Your “Dream 100” List (and profit from these key relationships for life) 

Lesson 3: Defining Your Painted Picture (and how to make your BIG outcomes inevitable)

Lesson 4: How to Create Success Habits That Support Your Growth in Life and Business



Plus a BONUS Q&A call where I’ll personally get on the line and help you get unstuck.



It’s over 60 minutes of the hard fought lessons and frameworks I wish i had when I first set foot in Silicon Valley to build and sell tech companies 10 years ago. 



And until today, the ONLY way you could get access was through enrolling to the full Idea to Exit Course (at the intro rate of $2,000). 



But since you’re reading this right now, you have the opportunity to build your own Founder’s Foundation for just $197. 



So if you were looking for a way to accelerate your growth as an entrepreneur, but weren’t quite ready to go “all in” with Idea to Exit…



… then i invite you to get started by building the right founder’s foundation TODAY.



Inside, you’ll find everything you need to start ACTING like the successful founder you have waiting within.



And from there, it’s only a matter of time before all that inner work translates into an impactful company that changes lives (and continues to transform yours).



To setting your powerful foundation, 



Dan



P.S. Many people have asked what my own success routines look like. 



While the answer to that is far less important than me helping you carve out the winning routines that line up with YOUR lifestyle and goals, I WILL reveal my single most impactful success habit in Video 4.



P.P.S. Almost forgot to mention… like it’s big brother, The Founder’s Foundation is also backed by a 30-Day Guarantee. Plenty of time to dive in, do the homework and set your success habits in motion before deciding if it’s the right course to fuel your growth. 





Example 2 (Same product with less hand holding) 



Subjects

How being an “Olympian” can save you X$

[SECOND CHANCE] 90 Day Year is back… but not for everyone.  

If you missed the boat… 



Body



I’ve decided to temporarily reopen the doors on a very SPECIAL EDITION of the 90 Day Year.



It’s a DIFFERENT version than the one you just missed out on. 



(more on that in a sec)



Accordingly, it’ll come at a brand new price point 



(you may be pleasantly surprised)



And it’ll only be available to you until DATE.  



(no exceptions) 



Now before I get into the details of what you’ll be getting with this new edition, I’m going to address the elephant in the room. 



Many of you reading this will ask - 



“Why is Todd doing this?... What’s his motivation?” 



So let’s nip it, shall we? 



I’m temporarily re-opening the PLAYBOOK edition of the 90-Day Year: 



>>> Not because I’ve had to respond to dozens of emails and FB messages from entrepreneurs who missed the deadline and insisted on a second chance. 



>>> Not because I want to pad the stats with a few extra sales (we’re doing fine, thank you)



>>> And definitely not because I enjoy twisting your arm (not my style)



I’m going out of my way to reopen the 90 Day Year for 3 more days for one specific reason. 



To reward a very special breed of entrepreneur



Maybe that’s you.



Maybe it’s not.



How do we know? 



Ask yourself a question - do you share similar qualities with “The Olympian”?



Let me elaborate.



In 18+ years working at the pinnacle of the performance field, I’ve had a chance to work with over 16,000 athletes.



It’s no small number. 



And with that level of experience comes some insight.



Most notably - that not all athletes are created equal.



And while i have bottomless amounts of respect for every athlete at every level of competition (in sport or business)...



… there’s a certain ‘type’ that really inspires the crap out of me.



The Olympian.



Why?



Because he/she shows up every damn day.



Except for 1 month every 4 years, The Olympian remains in the shadows - making ends meet, training day and night, spilling blood, sweat and tears in the name of a single goal.



Unlike the “big sport athlete”, the cash isn’t always there…



…  and WON’T be there unless they put in the type of performance that catapults them to the very top of their field.



They wake up every day with the determination to DO THE WORK.



Steadfast and self-reliant. 



They live for the grind.



Any lapse in focus spells certain failure, or in some sports… even death.



They spend more time in FLOW in a single month than many of us will spend in an entire lifetime.



And in a blink of an eye (or in 10 seconds if you’re a sprinter), it’s all over. 



There’s no “medal” given for potential. Only performance. 



And if you’re in an individual sport, then there’s no “team” to shelter your personal performance.



It’s all you. 



And I believe the concept of the “Olympian” can be transferred over to the entrepreneurial world. 



A self-starter who doesn’t need someone to drag them out of bed to do the hard sh*t. 



They enjoy the hustle. 



All they need is the PLAYBOOK - the plan - the strategies and systems, that when diligently executed, will make them grow into the world champion performer they have lurking inside.



And that’s why I created the 90 Day Year Playbook. 



For the ambitious, self-reliant entrepreneur who’s READY to execute things on his or her own.



For this *special breed* of entrepreneur, I stripped away everything else from the program:



No support group

No facebook community

No accountability partner

No extra distraction



Just you, a proven game plan, and your inner drive to execute it



WARNING:



The Playbook Edition comes at a significantly lower cost than the regular 90 Day Year, but it would be a critical mistake for you to see that as a discount, or a way to get in cheaper.



It’s just another way for you to reap the rewards without the larger investment...



WIll you join me?



(sign off)
